description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a low perimeter wall and landscaping, including several trees and bushes. The structure features a flat roof and a carport with a blue car parked underneath, adjacent to a circular above-ground pool and a small outdoor seating area. The main entrance is set back from the street, with a pathway leading through a gate in the front wall. Large windows and sliding doors are visible on multiple sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light-colored material, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and functional design. The property includes a driveway, a fenced yard, and a mix of paved and green outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a carport, above-ground pool, and landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall. Large windows and minimalistic design elements define its contemporary appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, and landscaped yard with trees and a low perimeter wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport with a blue car, above-ground pool, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, backyard, and sliding doors leading to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the bungalow, additional windows, and more landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows and sliding doors on multiple sides
